summary: Iteration 245 - Constellations API + Synergy Detection + Focus Mode Testing Complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major features verified working. OrbitalMixer renders with 21 orbital bubbles. Tap-to-toggle activates modules. Synergy counter shows '2 synergies' when modules share affinities. Focus Mode auto-triggers at 3+ active modules (body gets cosmic-focus-mode class). SmartDock collapses to resonance dot during focus mode. Constellation Panel opens with Save/Mine/Community/Market tabs. Save tab shows active module dots, name input, public/sell toggles, save button. Clear All button clears modules and exits focus mode.

issues: 'Credits running low' notification persists in bottom-right corner - may want to add dismiss option

critical_code_review_comments: constellations.py: Clean CRUD implementation with tier-based limits (0=3, 1=50, 2=unlimited)
constellations.py line 48-51: Only tier 2 can set is_for_sale, others get it reset to false
OrbitalMixer.js: Well-structured with DraggableBubble, PlayerHub, RingLabel subcomponents
OrbitalMixer.js line 463-480: synergyLines computed using checkSynergy from moduleRegistry
OrbitalMixer.js line 614-653: SVG synergy bonds rendered between modules with matching affinities
OrbitalMixer.js line 755-768: Synergy counter displays when synergyLines.length > 0
ConstellationPanel.js: Full CRUD UI with Save/Mine/Community/Marketplace tabs
ConstellationPanel.js line 31-48: computeSynergies calculates synergies from active modules
FocusContext.js line 22-36: Auto-trigger at 3+ active modules, hyper-focus at 5+
FocusContext.js line 40-45: Syncs body class for CSS-based focus hiding
SmartDock.js line 252-300: Resonance dot collapse when focusMode is true
moduleRegistry.js: Affinity tags (audio, spiritual, healing, nature, etc.) enable synergy detection
moduleRegistry.js line 118-129: checkSynergy returns shared affinities and score (0-1)
index.css line 1113-1136: Focus mode CSS rules dim navigation, crossbar, toolbar elements
seed_data_creation: Test constellations created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 245 verified: (1) Constellations API fully working - POST /api/constellations saves with module_ids, name, tags, synergies. GET /mine returns user's constellations. GET /community returns public ones. GET /marketplace returns for-sale ones. POST /{id}/like toggles like. POST /{id}/load returns module_ids and increments count. DELETE /{id} removes own constellation. (2) OrbitalMixer renders 21 bubbles across 5 orbital rings. (3) Synergy detection works - checkSynergy in moduleRegistry.js finds shared affinities. Synergy counter (data-testid='synergy-counter') shows when 2+ active modules share affinities. (4) Synergy bond SVG lines appear between synergized modules. (5) Focus Mode auto-triggers at 3+ active modules - body gets 'cosmic-focus-mode' class. (6) SmartDock collapses to resonance dot (data-testid='dock-resonance-dot') during focus mode. (7) Navigation/crossbar dim via CSS rules in index.css lines 1113-1136. (8) Focus toggle button (data-testid='orbital-focus-toggle') shows 'Exit Focus' when active. (9) Constellation Panel (data-testid='constellation-panel') has 4 tabs: save, my, community, marketplace. (10) Save tab shows active module dots, name input (data-testid='constellation-name-input'), public/sell toggles, save button (data-testid='constellation-save-btn'). (11) Clear All button (data-testid='orbital-clear-all') clears modules and exits focus mode. (12) Trial Graduation overlay may appear - dismiss with 'Continue with free plan' link.

backend_constellations_save.details: POST /api/constellations saves constellation with module_ids, name, tags, synergies

backend_constellations_community.details: GET /api/constellations/community returns public constellations (no auth required)

backend_constellations_load.details: POST /api/constellations/{id}/load returns module_ids and increments load_count

frontend_synergy_counter.details: Synergy counter shows '2 synergies' when modules share affinities

frontend_synergy_bonds.details: SVG synergy bond lines appear between synergized modules

frontend_constellation_panel.details: Recipes button opens ConstellationPanel with Save/Mine/Community/Market tabs

frontend_focus_mode_auto_trigger.details: Focus Mode auto-triggers at 3+ active modules (body gets cosmic-focus-mode class)

frontend_smartdock_resonance_dot.details: SmartDock collapses to resonance dot during focus mode

frontend_navigation_dims.details: Navigation bar dims/dissolves during focus mode via CSS rules

frontend_focus_toggle.details: Focus toggle button shows 'Exit Focus' when active, works correctly

frontend_clear_all.details: Clear All button clears all active modules and exits focus mode
